_meta.description: Restores Maya's factory-default viewport colors for exactly the keys the Blender style overrides — the undo/restore counterpart to Blender.json. Same targeted-overlay scope: only these keys are touched; Maya's hundreds of unrelated colors are never bulk-reset.
_meta.source: Maya 2025.3 GUI launched with a virgin MAYA_APP_DIR (true factory prefs), queried live via displayRGBColor/displayColor/colorIndex, 2026-07-09. Note: displayRGBColor(resetToFactory=True) does NOT restore backgroundTop/backgroundBottom, so a factory-prefs capture is the only reliable source.
_meta.background: Maya's factory background is the blue-gray gradient (top 0.535/0.617/0.702 -> bottom 0.052) with 0.36 flat gray when gradient mode is off. All three keys are restored so the result is correct in both modes.
_meta.grid: Factory dormant grid palette color (resolved via displayColor('grid', dormant=True) to a colorIndex slot at apply time, matching how the Blender style overrode it).
_meta.polyEdge: Factory DORMANT (deselected) polygon edge color — the light blue of unselected edges in component mode.
